creator: ozgur@kazancci.com
text:
Hello there,

A new (first) release of freenginx has just been released.

Can this be included in the FreeBSD's packages/ports repository to the benefit of all users?

Source code tarball: http://freenginx.org/download/freenginx-1.25.4.tar.gz

Downloads page: http://freenginx.org/en/download.html

Related to the upstream split, see:

https://mailman.nginx.org/pipermail/nginx-devel/2024-February/K5IC6VYO2PB7N4HRP2FUQIBIBCGP4WAU.html

Regards,
Özgür Konstantin Kazancci
